allow: Bash(node -e "const r=require\('C:/Projekty/return-app/.lint-baseline.json'\);const byFile={};let total=0;for\(const f of r\){const a=\(f.messages||[]\).filter\(m=>m.ruleId==='@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any'\);if\(a.length\){byFile[f.filePath]=a.length;total+=a.length;}}console.log\('TOTAL any:',total\);console.log\('FILES:',Object.keys\(byFile\).length\);const sorted=Object.entries\(byFile\).sort\(\(a,b\)=>b[1]-a[1]\).slice\(0,15\);for\(const [f,c] of sorted\)console.log\(c.toString\(\).padStart\(3\),f.replace\(/.*return-app[\\\\\\\\/]/,''\)\);")
